user.title: Set up Object Monitor
user.description: Configure monitored object labels and notification routing.

data_description.monitoring_timeout: Minutes an entity must remain unavailable before an offline notification is sent.
data_description.notification_mode: Single routing sends all object notifications to one script. Category routing sends notifications to category-specific scripts.
data_description.object_labels: Labels that identify monitored objects. Enter one label per line, for example qirim or hotel_kyiv.
data_description.heartbeat_interval: Reserved for future heartbeat support. Set 0 to disable.
data_description.debug_logging: Enable additional debug logging for this integration.

error.invalid_timeout: Timeout must be a positive number of minutes.
error.invalid_heartbeat_interval: Heartbeat interval must be 0 or a positive number.
error.object_labels_required: At least one object label is required.
error.invalid_object_label: Object labels may contain only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.reserved_object_label: Object labels cannot be device_monitoring or category labels such as security, light, or climate.

init.title: Object Monitor options
init.description: Update monitoring timeout, object labels, and notification routing.
